title: cacalia brachiata
intro: Cacalia brachiata, also known as the Brahmi or Water Hyssop, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Cacalia brachiata is often used as an infusion, decoction, or powder, and is also added to various Ayurvedic and Unani medicines to harness its medicinal properties.
